summary:
This PR extends blocked-continuation prioritization to the remaining SCM-driven phases: respond-to-review, respond-to-ci, and resolve-conflicts. Specifically:
1. Widened the continuation predicate in handleConcurrencyDeferral (consumer.ts) using isPrioritizedContinuation covering all four SCM-driven phases (review, respond-to-review, respond-to-ci, resolve-conflicts).
2. Added per-phase claim refresh on defer: review & respond-to-ci share and refresh the PR+SHA claim via refreshReviewDispatchClaim, resolve-conflicts refreshes via refreshConflictResolutionClaim, and respond-to-review has no claim to refresh.
3. Updated handlers to avoid re-claiming or double-counting on retries when continuationDispatchClaimed is true. For respond-to-ci, the PR fix-attempt counter is not incremented on retry; for resolve-conflicts, the claim conflict resolution SET NX is bypassed.
4. Added comprehensive unit tests validating correct deferral, claim refresh, retry behavior, and counter deduplication for all three new phases.
commitSubject: feat(worker): prioritize SCM-driven continuation phases and deduplicate retries
